ddls:
CREATE TABLE "complexes" (
  "complex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each complex */,
  "complex_name" TEXT /* Name of the complex */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the complex */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the complex record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the complex record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the complex record is active (current) or deprecated */,
  "pathways_involved" TEXT /* Biological pathways the complex is involved in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("complex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_complexes" (
  "gene_complex_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene-complex association */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "complex_id" INTEGER /* ID of the complex */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene-complex association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene-complex association was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the gene-complex association is active (current) or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_complex_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_complexes_complex_id FOREIGN KEY ("complex_id") REFERENCES complexes ("complex_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class or family */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class or family */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the class record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the class record is active (current) or deprecated */,
  "pathways_involved" TEXT /* Biological pathways the class is involved in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "organisms" (
  "organism_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organism */,
  "organism_name" TEXT /* Name of the organism */,
  "species" TEXT /* Species name of the organism */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organism record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the organism record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the organism record is active (current) or deprecated */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name for the organism */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organism_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "uniprot_entries" (
  "uniprot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each UniProt entry */,
  "uniprot_entry_name" TEXT /* UniProt Entry Name */,
  "other_uniprot_accessions" TEXT /* Other UniProt Accessions associated with the entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the UniProt entry record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the UniProt entry record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the UniProt entry record is active (current) or deprecated */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Protein sequence associated with the UniProt entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("uniprot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pdbs" (
  "pdb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each PDB */,
  "pdb_name" TEXT /* Name of the PDB */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the PDB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the PDB record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the PDB record was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the PDB record is active (current) or deprecated */,
  "resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the PDB structure */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used to determine the PDB structure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pdb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_uniprot" (
  "gene_uniprot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene-UniProt association */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "uniprot_id" INTEGER /* ID of the UniProt entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene-UniProt association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene-UniProt association was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the gene-UniProt association is active (current) or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_uniprot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_uniprot_uniprot_id FOREIGN KEY ("uniprot_id") REFERENCES uniprot_entries ("uniprot_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_pdbs" (
  "gene_pdb_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene-PDB association */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "pdb_id" INTEGER /* ID of the PDB */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene-PDB association was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the gene-PDB association was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the gene-PDB association is active (current) or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_pdb_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pdbs_pdb_id FOREIGN KEY ("pdb_id") REFERENCES pdbs ("pdb_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object containing permissions for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "gene_id" INTEGER /* ID of the gene */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the gene data */,
  "version_data" TEXT /* JSON object containing the gene data at the time of the version */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the version was last updated */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the version is active (current) or deprecated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)
